seo.title: Bonsai Hair Salon | Japanese hair specialist · Cairns CBD
seo.description: Japanese-run hair salon in Cairns. Shiseido Japanese permanent straightening, wedding hair and makeup, Yukata rental, and Japanese hair care products — 45 Grafton Street.

hero.title: BON
descriptionLines: Cairns climate–friendly techniques, Japanese product lines,
and a calm salon floor — cuts, straightening, weddings, and Yukata.

features.title: Japanese permanent straightening
features.desc: Shiseido Crystallizing Straight — less damage, softer feel. Suited to Cairns humidity. Regulars may qualify for a loyalty price (T&Cs apply on the current rate).

features.title: Wedding hair & make-up
features.desc: Bridal styling with rehearsal options, groom and guest hair and make-up, ceremony support, and a change before the reception. Ask for a free quote.

features.title: Yukata hire & dressing
features.desc: Rental and dressing for Bon dance, New Year’s fireworks, and local parades. Limited numbers — book early once you have a date.

beforeAfter.subtitle: Indicative layouts only — swap in your own photography with client permission.
beforeAfter.footerNote: Demo uses stock images. Published sites should use real before/after with consent and honest captions.

items.title: Japanese permanent straightening
items.caption: Shiseido Crystallizing Straight — smoother daily styling in humid weather (illustrative photos).

before.alt: Before: natural texture and volume before straightening

items.title: Colour & gloss refresh
items.caption: Tone and shine refresh — consult for your hair condition and goals.

images.alt: Stylist working on a client in a modern salon
Haircut and finish — natural light in the cutting area
Salon retail shelf with professional hair care products

menu.footerNote: Prices and packages change — please confirm on the day you book. Wedding and straightening are quoted after consultation.

items.name: Women's cut & blow-dry
items.desc: Cut and finish — tell us your daily styling routine and we'll shape for Cairns humidity

items.name: Men's cut
items.desc: Clipper and scissor work, tidy finish

items.name: Japanese straightening (Shiseido)
items.desc: Permanent straight with Crystallizing Straight — plan length and aftercare in salon

items.name: Colour & treatments
items.desc: Colour, gloss, and repair — patch test and strand test as needed

items.name: Wedding hair & make-up
items.desc: Bridal, groom, and guest packages — rehearsal and on-day timing available

items.name: Yukata rental & simple dressing
items.desc: Rental and fitting for events — subject to stock

items.name: Japanese hair care retail
items.desc: Take-home care and styling from Japanese lines stocked in-salon

hours.label: Hours
lines: Closed: Sunday, Monday, and public holidays

reservation.title: Book by phone
reservation.subtitle: The live venue may use other channels for bookings — this page is a sales demo. For accurate hours and services, use the contact details you agree with the salon.

footer.subLine: Sales sample — not the live venue. Public facts referenced from the venue’s public web presence (e.g. bonsaihairsalon.com.au). Images: Unsplash (demo only).
